title: blemeesd.opened
description: Reply to blemeesd.open on success. `last_seq` is the highest seq the session has produced at this moment — clients can compare to their `last_seen_seq` to decide if a replay is in flight. `native_session_id` is the backend's own identifier (CC `--session-id`; Codex `threadId`).

native_session_id.description: Backend-side identifier. Equal to session_id for Claude; the Codex `threadId` for Codex (set after the first turn completes; absent on the first opened frame for a fresh codex session).
